title: Revamped Russian Translations Enhance User Accessibility

topics.title: UI Consistency Fixes
topics.summary: A fix was implemented to remove visible borders from package suggestion dropdown items on the Compare page, ensuring a consistent appearance across light and dark themes. The adjustment involved modifying the ButtonBase component to maintain visual coherence and enhance user experience.

topics.title: Dependency Management Improvements
topics.summary: The project has updated the devdependency 'knip' to version 5.86.0, which involved removing unnecessary entries and ignoring dependencies in the configuration. This update streamlines the configuration process and enhances the overall maintainability of the project by eliminating redundant patterns.

topics.title: User Handle Updates
topics.summary: The user handle for patak has been updated from @patak-dev to @patak-cat, reflecting changes in their online identity. This update ensures consistency across the platform and avoids confusion in references. The change was confirmed through tests that remained unaffected despite the handle update.

topics.title: Translation Updates
topics.summary: Recent updates to the Russian translations have been made, including the addition of untranslated strings and revisions to existing translations. This effort aims to improve the accessibility and usability of the platform for Russian-speaking users, ensuring better communication and understanding.
